heading: Additional Information
body:
For more information about the concepts in this guide, see the following documentation:

- [db.runCommand()](manual/reference/method/db.runCommand)

- [Database Commands](manual/reference/command)

- [hello Command](manual/reference/command/hello)

- [find Command](manual/reference/command/find)

To learn how to retrieve data from a cursor, see the
[Access Data From a Cursor](node-access-cursor) fundamentals page.
